texto: I sat with my toes buried in the warm yellow sand staring out towards the back door of The East. Pacific Ocean Blue was playing in the background and it had left me in a state of Bohemia as the waves crashed ashore
explicacao: Citação de roaring as loud as lions. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I sat with my toes buried in the warm yellow sand staring out towards the back door of The East. …” articula reflexao, david-louden, white-mexicans em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como white-mexicans.
